layoutRegions.name: readiness-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Snapshot export candidates, packet coverage, reviewer blockers, and audit destinations.

layoutRegions.name: review-packet-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare access review exports by sealed packet coverage, blockers, destinations, and delivery progress.

layoutRegions.name: delivery-workspace
layoutRegions.purpose: Track missing evidence, delegated approvals, retry exceptions, destination receipts, and rollback-safe delivery commands.

components.name: MetricTile
components.purpose: Compact readiness counter with a token-colored risk tone.

components.name: ReviewCard
components.purpose: Export candidate card showing readiness status, coverage, blocker, destination, and progress.
interactions: status chip maps to readiness state

components.name: DestinationRow
components.purpose: Audit destination row with receipt state and routing lane.
interactions: receipt status remains readable at narrow widths
row layout does not shift when state changes

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button and status row has a visible focus or stable hover-safe presentation.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
